title: euphorbia terracina var. retusa
intro: Euphorbia terracina var. retusa, also known as the wolf's milk or dragon's blood, is a variety of succulent plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Euphorbia terracina var. retusa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, including extracts and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity and interactions with other medications.
